I PURCHASED A 2020 TOYOTA SUPRA ON NOVEMBER 11, 2019. ON DECEMBER 2,2019. THIS VEHICLE SERIOUSLY AND VERY DANGEROUSLY MALFUNCTIONED. I WAS PULLING OUT OF MY RESIDENTIAL AREA AFTER STOPPING AT A STOP SIGN, PROCEEDED TO MAKE A LEFT ONTO GREENSPRING AVE. , HEADING TOWARDS THE BELTWA

narrative.headline: What 2020 Toyota Supra owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 15 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (20% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
